description: The act of drawing special attention to something, often in a visual or symbolic way. It is the process of making a point shine.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'so' (light, clarity) and 'li' (light, illumination). The word's structure literally means 'clarifying light.' This is a highly transparent composition that perfectly captures the visual metaphor of highlighting as shedding extra light on a subject to make it stand out.
